zh.Nantwich, Cheshire, , England: 英國英格蘭爾南特維其
zh.lifeSummary: Kenric de Calveley是Hugh Calveley和Alicia Calveley的兒子，於1285年出生在英國英格蘭爾南特維其。他和Margaret Matilda Warde至少有4個兒子。他去世於1355年之前在英國爾卡爾維勒。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Calveley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Calverley
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): habitational name from Calverley in Yorkshire, named with Old English calfra (genitive plural of calf ‘calf’) + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Alternatively, in some instances the name may be a variant of the habitational name Calveley, from a place so called in Cheshire (with the same meaning as above), or from Calverleigh in Devon, meaning ‘the clearing of the bare wood’ (Old English calu ‘bare, bald’ + wudu ‘wood’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’).

nameMeanings.name: Kenric
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Kendrick
meanings: In modern use a transferred use of the surname, the origins of which are complex. The source in many cases is the Old Welsh personal name Cynwrig. This is of uncertain derivation: it may be composed of elements meaning ‘high, exalted’ + ‘hill’ or ‘summit’. The Scottish surname Ken(d)rick is a shortened form of MacKen(d)rick (Gaelic Mac Eanraig ‘son of Henry’); Scottish bearers are descended from a certain Henry MacNaughton, and the (Mac)Ken(d)ricks are a sept of Clan MacNaughton. As an English surname, Ken(d)rick is derived, at least in part, from the Middle English given name Cenric, in which two Old English personal names have fallen together: Cēnerīc (from cēne ‘keen’ + rīc ‘power’) and Cynerīc (from cyne ‘royal’ + rīc ‘power’). Cenric survived as a given name into the 17th century.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: Kenric de Calveley was born in 1285, in Nantwich, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom as the son of Hugh Calveley and Alicia Calveley. He had at least 4 sons with Margaret Matilda Warde. He died before 1355, in Calveley, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Kenric de Calveley est né en 1285, à Nantwich, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Hugh Calveley et Alicia Calveley. Il a eu au moins 4 fils avec Margaret Matilda Warde. Il est décédé avant 1355, à Calveley, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Kenric de Calveley wurde 1285 in Nantwich, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Hugh Calveley und Alicia Calveley geboren. Er hatte mit Margaret Matilda Warde mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb vor 1355 in Calveley, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Kenric de Calveley è nato il nel 1285 nel Nantwich, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di Hugh Calveley e Alicia Calveley. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli con Margaret Matilda Warde. Morì prima del 1355, nel Calveley, Cheshire, England.

ja.Nantwich, Cheshire, , England: イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアナントウィチ
ja.Calveley, Cheshire, England: イギリスチェシュアイアカルベリー
ja.lifeSummary: Kenric de Calveleyは1285年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアナントウィチでHugh CalveleyとAlicia Calveleyの息子として生まれた。彼はMargaret Matilda Wardeとの間に少なくとも4人の息子をもうけた。彼は1355年以前にイギリスチェシュアイアカルベリーで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Kenric de Calveley(은)는 1285년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 난트위치에서 Hugh Calveley(와)과 Alicia Calveley의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Margaret Matilda Warde(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1355년 이전 영국 체실르 캘벨리에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Kenric de Calveley nasceu em 1285, em Nantwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de Hugh Calveley e Alicia Calveley. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos com Margaret Matilda Warde. Ele faleceu antes 1355, em Calveley, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Kenric de Calveley родился в 1285 г. в местности нантвич, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Hugh Calveley и Alicia Calveley. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына от Margaret Matilda Warde. Он умер перед 1355 г. в местности калвели, чешир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Kenric de Calveley nació en 1285, en Nantwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de Hugh Calveley y Alicia Calveley. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos con Margaret Matilda Warde. Murió antes de 1355, en Calveley, Cheshire, Inglaterra.
